narrative:
Precinct E Liverpool 3-A (precinct in Columbiana County) has 605 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
